title: Price Check on Original Unopened UCC Coffee Cans
display_title: Price Check on Original Unopened UCC Coffee Cans
wikitext:
[]: Price Check on Original Unopened UCC Coffee Cans             Quote Post by CodeWarrior » Sun Mar 03, 2013 6:43 pm Anyone know what the going price for a full set (6) of the original UCC Coffee Cans, unopened is? I don't want to get scammed.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 03, 2013 6:52 pm It's usually 250 to 300 yen a can at the vending machine, so maybe 300 x 6 + shipping? Unless you're talking about one of the ones from 1997, then I don't know if there's a collector's item premium for that.

[]:             Quote Post by CodeWarrior » Sun Mar 03, 2013 8:11 pm Indeed, I am talking about the collectors cans from 1997. 6 total cans each with one of the characters on it (to my knowledge there were only 6 designs, so this would constitute all of them).

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Mar 04, 2013 10:38 pm It depends also if the can is opened or not and the condition. What are you seeing in terms of prices?

[]:             Quote Post by CodeWarrior » Tue Mar 05, 2013 10:19 pm Like new, unopened (with cardboard box even). 6 Cans, 6 characters. of 16 year old coffee.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Mar 06, 2013 1:39 am Sure, I would like that too, moreso the pillow of the Rei can shown in E-Mono. But without an actual example of what a seller is actually offering, it's hard to say if a price is fair or not. This is why I asked what have you seen in terms of pricing.
